reference: I have been experiencing some strange things happening to my body. About two months ago, I discovered I had chlamydia and I treated it. A couple of weeks ago, I started having really bad pain in my abdominal area, and I have had severe cramps ever since. I have gained weight, have been nauseous, and have not gotten my period, so I thought I might be pregnant. However, I took a pregnancy test at home a couple of days ago, and it was negative. Now I am thinking it could be something else, or maybe I have chlamydia again. Do you know what it could be or what I should do? I am only sixteen and I am really scared.
text: i have been experiencing some strange things happening to my body about two months ago i discovered i had chlamydia and i treated it a couple of weeks ago i started having really bad pain in my abdominal area and i have had severe cramps ever since i have gained weight have gained nauseous and have not gotten my period so i thought i might be pregnant however i took a pregnancy test at home a couple of days ago and it was negative now i am thinking it could be something else or maybe i have chlamydia again do you know what it could be or what i should do i am only six and i am really scared
